name: Camper's Pizza
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Mushroom stems and pieces; diced
2 1/4 oz Sliced pitted ripe olives; diced
1/3 cup Green bell pepper; coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and onion in a well-seasoned 11 to 12-inch cast iron skillet over medium coals.
2. Remove the meat mixture to paper towels to drain excess fat.
3. Turn off the heat and discard drippings from the pan.
4. Separate the crescent rolls into triangles and place them in the skillet, points toward the center, to form a circle.
5. Press edges together to form the bottom crust about 1 inch up the side of the pan.
6. Spread half of the pizza sauce over the dough.
7. Spoon the ground beef mixture over the sauce.
8. Cover with mushrooms, olives, and green pepper.
9. Pour remaining sauce over everything; sprinkle with cheese and oregano.
10. Place the pan in the center of the grill or cooking grid over medium coals.
11. Cover the cooker securely and cook for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the crust is lightly browned.
12. If using an open grill or coals, cover the pan securely with foil.
